description_long: This is a modern axe with a distinctive angular design, featuring a black handle and blade accented by bold red streaks. The handle is straight with a slight ergonomic curve and appears to be made from a composite or reinforced polymer material, providing both durability and grip. The blade is broad and flat, with a single sharp edge and a pronounced angular transition to the handle, suggesting a tactical or rescue-oriented design. The surface finish is matte with a grippy texture, and the red markings may serve as visual identifiers or branding. The axe is compact, likely intended for one-handed use, and the overall construction appears robust and suitable for heavy-duty urban tasks. No visible fasteners or traditional wooden elements are present, indicating a modern, possibly molded or integrated mounting style.
description: A modern, black-and-red axe with an angular blade and ergonomic handle, featuring a matte, grippy finish and bold visual accents. The design is compact and robust, suitable for urban utility or tactical use.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an oblique angle, highlighting the angular transition between the handle and blade, as well as the red streaks on both parts.
description_view_1: A side profile view shows the full length of the handle and the flat, broad blade, emphasizing the axe's slim and streamlined silhouette.
description_view_2: A front-facing view displays the blade's edge and the handle's end, revealing the thickness of the blade and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile shows the continuous red markings along the handle and blade, with the angular geometry clearly visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, slightly ergonomic handle made of reinforced polymer with a round cross-section and grippy surface, featuring red accent markings.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, flat, single-edged blade with an angular transition to the handle, no beard, and a pronounced poll; decorated with red streaks.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern integrated or molded mounting with no visible fasteners.
